access.label: Πρόσβαση με άσφαλτο
access.notes: Μικρός όρμος/λιμανάκι κοντά στον οικισμό, με εύκολη πρόσβαση με τα πόδια ή δρόμο και υπηρεσίες κοντά.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η direct beach source αναφέρει ρηχό προφίλ νερού.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 final South Aegean organized-service cleanup 2026-05-25: downgraded unsupported organized-service claim because no direct source URL is recorded; kept nearby food/parking notes only. Source follow-up pass 37 2026-05-28: direct GetGreece beach page supports Mandraki beach identity/location on Kastellorizo. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

GetGreece supports Mandraki on Kastellorizo as an easy-access sand/pebble, unorganized beach with taverna, parking, no natural shade and shallow-water context. Its calm-water wording was not imported into live condition logic.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct island/beach source coverage for recorded access, terrain, depth, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.

access.label: Μόνο με βάρκα
access.notes: Παραλία στη νησίδα Άγιος Γεώργιος, με σύντομη πρόσβαση με καραβάκι/boat hire από το Καστελλόριζο. Οι παροχές είναι εποχικές και περιορισμένες στη νησίδα.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το βάθος συνήθως ανεβαίνει πιο γρήγορα μετά την είσοδο στη θάλασσα.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3K source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece gives matching coordinates for Agios Georgios island and describes boat access from Kastellorizo plus seasonal platform/loungers, cafe/food, shower/changing/toilet facilities. Kept as boat-only with seasonal/limited-service wording.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Kastellorizo records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece, Exploring Greece and local Kastellorizo source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain and service context. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

access.label: Μονοπάτι περίπου 45 λεπτών ή θαλάσσιο ταξί
access.notes: Το Exploring Greece αναφέρει μονοπάτι 1.200 μ. περίπου 45 λεπτών από την περιοχή του λιμανιού προς τις Πλάκες, καθώς και πρόσβαση από τη θάλασσα.

waterDepth.label: Βραχώδης είσοδος
waterDepth.notes: Οι πηγές τεκμηριώνουν βραχώδη/ασβεστολιθική ακτή, όχι αξιόπιστο ρηχό ή βαθύ προφίλ.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 small singleton cleanup 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece supports Plakes as a Kastellorizo swimming area reached by a path from the port area or by sea taxi, and explains the name as flat rocks. Kalispera identifies Plakes as a limestone beach, while Poseidon notes no organized beaches on Kastellorizo. Encoded access, rocky terrain, and no organized services; no live condition claim was encoded.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Kastellorizo records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece, Exploring Greece and local Kastellorizo source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain and service context. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
